transcript.text:
[A portion of the advertisement earnings will be donated to child welfare facilities to help children in need]
[She's Korean]
[Americano Sweet]
[Americano Black]
[Royal Hazelnut]
[Decaf Black]
[Let's go on a world tour with Jyadeng Signature 1.1L]
Hello everyone
I prepared Jyadeng SIgnature 1.1L and some dessert today
Covid cases are starting to rise again
So I thought I'd try other countries' desserts from around the world
Here's South Korea
Germany
Belgium
France, etc
It says 'Exciting Travel Event' here

It's a raffle
I'll eat it with some coffee Bon appetit!
Firstly,
Sweet!
Sweet Americano
It's really big, right?
It's 1.1L
[What is this scent?]
[Can't stop]
It's sweet
It's sweet and nutty
Now for some dessert
Turkish dessert
It's pretty, right?
That goes well together
This sweet coffee goes well since the cookies aren't sweet

Next
Everything looks so pretty I can't eat it
Belgian waffles Since there are 2 waffles here
[Now that's dessert]
A dessert has to be sweet
Black this time
For some sweets
That's deep
I usually make this face when I drink bitter Americano
This one's not like that at all
The black one goes well with the sweets
Next next
French dessert
I forgot the name of it What is it?
I thought it was going to be straight up bread
As for the taste... Well, I don't know coffee that well

It's very deep... and...
What am I saying?
It's like those coffees from cafes, not convenience stores
It tastes like it's actually brewed from a cafe
This one is Korean
Fish-shaped pastry
It's not red beans, It's cream
Black coffee is perfect for sweets
I can keep eating
Australia
I can't remember the name
Australian cake?
It's also black inside
It's still sweet
I can taste a little bit of dark chocolate in this one
And this one is like a sweet chocolate

This doesn't look too sweet
First aid
I'm not too good at eating sweet stuff
Japanese Wagashi (sweet flower cake)
I wonder what it tastes like
[Strawberry]
Strawberry!
Tasty
Next
American cheesecake
Subscribe
This one's very nutty It should go well with Hazelnut
[Royal Hazelnut]
I have a lot of ice
Yummy
I love Hazelnut

I love the scent
With some cheesecake
You know that distinct hazelnut scent
Nuttiness with some brown sugar
What next?
German pretzels
Heart-shaped
This should also go well with hazelnut coffee since the pretzel is not sweet
Delicious
I prefer salty foods over sweet foods
It's perfect together
I'm going to save it for last
Australian pie?
Look at the inside!
It looks like some kind of meat
What was the name of this again?

It's white inside
It's white on the inside
[It tastes dark]
[Very dark]
I'm going to drink some decaf
How can coffee be decaffeinated?
I was told they get rid of caffeine with natural sparkling water
I can drink a lot of this since it's decaf, right?
It's coffee
How can it taste just like coffee without caffeine?
It's very clean And also nutty
So cool
I know people that drink numerous cups of coffee a day
I'm sure this bottle can last you a few days
Now that I've tried everything
Carrot cake

[Carrots? That's a vegetable...]
Cute
[Retreat]
I can't eat the one in the middle
I give up on this one
This mukbang would've been over already if I didn't have coffee
[But we have coffee]
[Can't stop]
Next
I'm scared
It has carrots inside
[Get rid of the evidence]
What was here just now?
I didn't exceed the caffeine limit yet
This one is strawberry too
Strawberry is the best

It goes really well with the fruitiness
[Searching for a target]
[Elliminated]
It's not carrot flavored Thank goodness
A cup of hazelnut
French madeleine
I've never seen a chocolate madeleine
It looks like a turtle
Is this a turtle?
I didn't know I liked pretzels this much
This fish-shaped pastry is so cute
It's so cute, I can't eat it
[Eats it]
This is a lot of coffee
1 bottle can get you about 5 cups
It's perfect to have it at home

I couldn't memorize it, so I'll read off of it
[Reading Jyadeng Signature's specialty]
... is what it says
[Sweets are okay as long as I have coffee]
This must be matcha, right?
This is by far the sweetest
[This is why you have coffee]
[Full]
This is decaf, so I can drink a lot of it
I've seen this on YouTube before
[This is YouTube too]
This cookie is very dry
How do those YouTubers eat this?
Last sweet flower cake
This should be strawberry as well, right?
[What is this?]

A lot of strange desserts
[Boss]
This is not for me
[Finished]
They're hosting an event
If you look at the bottle, it says 'Exciting Travel Event'
It's a raffle event
There's a QR code here
I'll try not to damage the QR code
There's a code here
Scan it like this
It'll go to the event page
Type in the code
Let's check
I didn't get it
That's too bad

But they are giving away a total of 300 Million Won worth of products
1st place will receive a 3 Million Won towards travel out of the country
So be sure to check your codes
Should I try 1 more?
Please!
[A portion of the advertisement earnings will be donated to child welfare facilities to help children in need]
Thanks everyone
(Part of the advertising revenue will be donated to 'Dongmyung Children's Welfare Center') [Subtitles by Hyun Choi] [antharoni@gmail.com]
